KXBRASILEIROBGAME-26JUL16BRANAU-BRA.rules_primary: If CR Brasil wins the CR Brasil vs Nautico professional Brasileiro Serie B soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 16, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.

If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two weeks away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
